name: Singapore Airlines

carryOn.notes: Economy: 1 carry-on up to 7 kg. Premium Economy: 1 carry-on up to 7 kg. Business/First: 2 carry-on items up to 16 kg combined.

firstClass.notes: Included: 50 kg in First Class / Suites.

fees.overweight: Excess weight fees apply beyond allowance

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Spare lithium-ion batteries must be in carry-on baggage only
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Hand baggage only. Up to 100Wh unrestricted. 101–160Wh requires airline approval. Over 160Wh not permitted.
batteryRules.laptops: Permitted in cabin baggage. Remove at security screening per CAAS regulations.

restrictedItems: Hoverboards and personal mobility devices with lithium batteries

faqs.question: How much checked baggage does Singapore Airlines Economy include?
faqs.answer: Singapore Airlines Economy class passengers receive 25 kg of checked baggage, which is more generous than many competitors. Premium Economy includes 35 kg, Business Class 40 kg, and First Class / Suites 50 kg.

faqs.question: What is Singapore Airlines carry-on weight limit?
faqs.answer: Economy and Premium Economy passengers may carry one bag up to 7 kg. Business and First Class passengers may bring two carry-on items with a combined weight of up to 16 kg.

faqs.question: Can I bring a power bank on Singapore Airlines?
faqs.answer: Power banks must be packed in your carry-on / hand luggage — they are not allowed in checked baggage. Banks up to 100Wh are permitted. Banks between 101–160Wh require approval from Singapore Airlines before flying.
